title: How to Organize Rabbit Trails Without Killing Them
strapline: A day that keeps curiosity alive without turning it into chaos
signal: Curiosity stack transformed into a guided next step
sourceSubtitle: A curious learner's real pile: books, clips, questions, and side paths that still need shape.

sourceItems.label: Bird migration article
sourceItems.detail: The thing that started the curiosity detour in the first place

sourceItems.label: Two saved short videos
sourceItems.detail: Helpful, but easy to overconsume without a clear stop point

sourceItems.label: Notebook page full of questions
sourceItems.detail: Why do birds travel that far, and how do they know where to go?

sourceItems.label: Map idea
sourceItems.detail: Track one migration route instead of trying to learn everything at once

sourceItems.label: Small output idea
sourceItems.detail: Make one sketch or narration so the curiosity turns into a finished step

tiktok.hook: Take this rabbit trail and turn it into a day that keeps the curiosity alive.
tiktok.caption: Rabbit trails are not the problem. The problem is when they never get shaped into a doable next step.
beats: Show the article, saved videos, and notebook questions as a curiosity pile.
Say that most systems either kill the rabbit trail or let it sprawl forever.
Cut to the Today page with one read, one map, one narration, and one next question.
End with the promise that the curiosity stayed alive but the learner still got a real day.
tiktok.cta: Lesson Hollow gives rabbit trails enough shape to move without flattening them.

tasks.title: Read the migration article
tasks.note: Focus on the part about how birds navigate

tasks.title: Watch one migration clip
tasks.note: Use it to clarify the route, not replace the reading

tasks.title: Trace one migration path
tasks.note: Draw the route from start to stop on the map

tasks.title: Narrate the most surprising fact
tasks.note: Say it out loud, then write one sentence

tasks.title: Save tomorrow's next rabbit trail
tasks.note: Write one question worth following next time
